stonetop.summary: An ancient boar grown iron-hided, scarred, and grudge-bound.

system.concept: An ancient boar grown iron-hided, scarred, and grudge-bound.
system.description: When a boar lives long enough, survives enough close calls, and dines year after year on the roots and nuts of ferro trees, it eventually becomes a raselbaedd: the size of a horse, with tusks like short spears and a hide crisscrossed with scars and bristling with broken blades. Its hide (immobile, Value 2) can be harvested by a competent hunter with a fine steel blade and fashioned into 1d4 raselbaedd cuirasses (2 armor, Value 3).
